## File Inventory

<!-- One entry per non-test, non-vendor source file.
     Format: <relative-path> TAB <type>
     Types:
     - screen          : visual page / view / standalone form (consumer of routes/services).
                         Delphi (.dfm): root object is TForm or a TForm descendant.
     - screen-embedded : visual but NOT standalone â€” embedded panel. Delphi (.dfm): root TFrame.
                         Counted as a sub-region by Phase 05 IPE, NOT as a top-level screen.
                         (count_screen_files.py deliberately excludes this tag.)
     - datamodule      : non-visual reachable container. Delphi (.dfm): root TDataModule.
                         NOT a screen â€” surfaces in feature-list/behavior-logic. Append a trailing
                         `[reachable]` token when it hosts user-reachable elements
                         (TActionList/TAction/report component) so Phase 05 picks it up.
     - route           : route definition files
     - model           : data model / entity / schema files
     - background      : jobs, workers, event listeners, scheduled tasks
     - permission      : policy, gate, middleware, auth files
     - config          : env, settings, manifests
     - other           : utility, helper, shared logic not fitting above

     Delphi .dfm classification rule (v21.0.0): read the FIRST non-blank line
     `object <Name>: <BaseClass>` â€” the BaseClass decides the tag (TFormâ†’screen,
     TFrameâ†’screen-embedded, TDataModuleâ†’datamodule). NEVER classify by file extension.
     Binary (older Delphi) .dfm that cannot be read as text â†’ tag `screen [UNVERIFIED]`
     + flag for the researcher; do not guess the kind. -->

{relative/path/to/file.ext}	{type}

## Background Logic Source Inventory

<!-- Generated by Wave 0 alongside File Inventory. DO NOT edit manually.
     This section is the cardinality contract consumed by Wave 2b researcher
     and Wave 7a reviewer. All discovered BL source files MUST appear here.

     Detection: read references/bl-source-patterns.md for per-stack patterns.
     Mode A stacks (Laravel/Rails/Django): apply folder-convention globs.
     Mode B stacks (NestJS/Spring/FastAPI/Go/Rust/.NET): apply annotation grep.
     Stack not in table: use [SIGNAL_INFERRED] protocol (see bl-source-patterns.md).

     Format per entry: `- {category}: {relative/path/to/File.ext}`
     Mode B with multiple hits in same file: one entry per hit (Symbol disambiguates).
     Sort: by category ascending, then by path ascending (deterministic).
     Empty category: emit `_(none found)_` â€” never silently skip. -->

## Detected API Kind: {kind}

<!-- Emitted ONLY when `--api-contracts` flag is set. When flag is off, omit this section entirely.
     Detection: read references/api-contract-source-patterns.md.
     Presence of *.graphql/schema.graphql or apollo/lighthouse/graphene/strawberry dep â†’ graphql.
     Presence of *.proto or grpc dep â†’ grpc.
     Both â†’ mixed.
     Neither â†’ rest (default).
